description: Negative-control fixture for repo-memory dedup heuristic: a legitimate refinement pair (same subject, materially different fact) derived from the 'ControlFlow eval harness' cluster's early-vs-late evolution must NOT be flagged.
goal: Dedup heuristic does not flag a legitimate refinement pair with Jaccard < 0.85

input.normalize: lowercase, strip punctuation, collapse whitespace, tokenize on whitespace

existing_entry.subject: ControlFlow eval harness
existing_entry.fact: Repository's canonical verification is `cd evals && npm test` (offline eval harness) and CI runs this command.

candidate_entry.subject: ControlFlow eval harness
candidate_entry.fact: Canonical repository validation runs offline via `cd evals && npm test`, which executes `validate.mjs` plus prompt-behavior and orchestration-handoff regression tests without invoking live agents.

expected.rationale: The existing entry mentions only the command itself; the candidate adds material detail (validate.mjs, prompt-behavior regression tests, orchestration-handoff tests, offline-only assertion). Normalized token overlap is ~33%, well below the 0.85 threshold. This is a legitimate refinement and should not be blocked.
